title.en: At this time, the clone of the Wind Mountain Lo...

content.en:
This black mountain of the Black Wind Mountain descended on the Dao Mountain Realm, and a large number of powerhouses flew out of it.

At this time, the clone of the Wind Mountain Lord automatically dissipated.

After all, the main body is here, and there is no need to maintain the clone.

Jinchen Daozu, as the Wind Mountain lineage, had never seen the Black Mountain Lord and the Black Wind Mountain Lord, but they also learned a lot of information from the mouth of the Wind Mountain Mountain Lord.

So, when the Black Mountain Lord and the Black Wind Mountain Lord came, Jin Chen Daozu and others greeted one after another: "Meet the Black Wind Mountain Lord, meet the Black Mountain Lord!"

The Lord of Black Wind Mountain is an elite domain ancestor who looks like a middle-aged fat man, and he looks very kind, but it must not be easy to be able to take charge of Black Wind Mountain.

However, the Black Mountain Lord is a cold man, exuding a black aura all over his body, which makes people dare not approach.

"Let's go, let's go to the Xuanxu Taboo!"

The main road of the Black Wind Mountain is opened.

I saw that the black mountain continued to shrink, gradually turning into the size of a palm, falling into his hands, and putting it away.

This black mountain is not a real mountain, but it is actually a high-grade domain weapon, called the Black Domain Mountain, which is the treasure left by the original Black Wind Mountain Lord to the Black Wind Mountain, and it has a powerful defense and concealment effect.

This time, Black Wind Mountain crossed the Dark Forbidden Domain, did not encounter major troubles, and the loss was very small, and this high-grade domain weapon, Black Black Domain Mountain, occupied a lot of credit.

Soon, they all came to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

Soon after.

The Black Wind Mountain Lord, the Black Mountain Mountain Lord, the Wind Mountain Lord, and the three mountain lords came to the human realm and wanted to meet Ye Tian.

For the arrival of the three mountain masters, Ye Tian also gave face and entertained them.

The human world.

The three mountain lords drank and chatted with Ye Tian.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, we want to know about the situation in the Dark Sacred Domain, I wonder if we can talk about it?"

The main road of Black Wind Mountain.

"The Wind Mountain Lord also knows a lot about the situation!" Ye Tiandao.

The Mountain Lord of the Wind Mountain said with a smile: "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, what I have learned is only superficial things, and those half-step domain ancestors of the Battle Realm Tower don't know much. "

"You want to know something, otherwise I can't tell!"

Ye Tian said bluntly.

The Black Wind Mountain Lord hurriedly asked, "Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, we want to cross the Forbidden River, is there any other way for this?"

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, in fact, he also understood the Forbidden River, it stands to reason that without the strength of the Supreme Domain Ancestor, if he wants to cross the Forbidden River, he must be dead, but it is not absolute.

"It's not that there is no way!" Ye Tian revealed: "There are ten holy gates in the Dark Holy Domain, one of which is the Forbidden Holy Gate, this holy gate is completely composed of forbidden creatures, if you get the token of the forbidden holy object, even the forbidden creatures in the forbidden river will give face, and it will not embarrass you." "

"Tokens, how do I get them?"

The Black Wind Mountain Lord was a little excited.

"I'm afraid this is even more difficult than breaking through the Supreme Domain Ancestor!" Ye Tian said: "How powerful the Forbidden Holy Gate is, even the Supreme Domain Ancestor doesn't put it in their eyes, I'm afraid that only the Supreme Domain Ancestor has the qualifications to discuss with them." Moreover, they only recruit forbidden creatures, not cultivators, and it is too difficult to obtain their tokens!"

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor, let's talk about a way that we have hope!"

The main road of Black Wind Mountain.

"When I go to the Dark Sanctuary, follow me, I'll take you there, this is the only way, otherwise I don't think you have any way to cross the Forbidden River!" Ye Tian proposed.

The three mountain lords didn't think that Ye Tian would be able to cross the Forbidden River, after all, Ye Tian was only in the same realm like this, if he broke through to the Domain Ancestor and the Elite Domain Ancestor, how terrifying would the strength be, and it would naturally not be difficult to take them through the Forbidden River.

"Then in the future, it will be troublesome to the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors!"

The Lord of Black Wind Mountain put down his hair and thanked him.

Subsequently, the three mountain lords also learned more about the Dark Sacred Domain from Ye Tiankou.

In short, the Supreme Domain Ancestor is really nothing in the Dark Sacred Domain, but he just barely has the qualifications to build a city-level force, but he really thinks that he can establish a power by reaching the Supreme Domain Ancestor, that is looking for death!

I don't know how many giant cities have been destroyed in the Dark Sanctuary, if you don't have a backer, you build a giant city today, and tomorrow it will be broken by nearby forces.

Therefore, it is necessary to find a backer in the Dark Sanctuary.

If there is no backer, the Supreme Domain Ancestor only has the qualifications to break through, and he will not be bullied casually.

But once it reaches the level of the Invincible Domain Ancestor, it is different, that is to have a real status, to be admired by countless people, and even to establish a force, which is enough to suppress the Quartet.

"Wanfa Dao Ancestor, if you kill those five elite domain ancestors, you can be regarded as offending the five top domain ancestors, be careful! I estimate that those five top domain ancestors will also come. Now that the coordinates of the Dao Mountain Realm are no longer a secret, the powerhouses of the Divine Heaven Realm will come across the Dark Forbidden Domain at any time. Not to mention the top domain ancestors who are already on the way, if even now, the top domain ancestors set off, in 1 million years, they can cross over. The speed of the top domain ancestor is very fast, much faster than us!"

Before leaving, the Black Wind Mountain Lord reminded.

"The Black Wind Mountain Lord doesn't need to worry, it's just the top domain ancestor!"

Ye Tian didn't say much, but there was no fear of the top domain ancestor in his words.

As soon as the three mountain masters heard this, they knew that Ye Tian had hole cards and was not afraid of the top domain ancestors.

Although they don't know what the hole cards are, the Holy Gate and the Holy Son must have means that they can't understand, so they won't remind them anymore.

Soon after.

A Domain Ancestor descended to the Daoshan Realm, and many of them were top Domain Ancestors, but one of the top Domain Ancestors was the sect master that the Tianyin Domain Ancestor was loyal to, the Tianrui Domain Ancestor.

The Tianrui Domain Ancestor was the one who followed the Black Wind Mountain, and his subordinate Tianyin Domain Ancestor was the one who followed the Haohai Sea Ancestor.

Therefore, as soon as the Tianrui Domain Ancestor came to the Daoshan Realm, he tried to contact the Tianyin Domain Ancestor, but he couldn't get in touch.

"Could it be that the Heavenly Sound Domain Ancestor betrayed?"

Tianrui Domain Ancestor thought of this possibility.

However, he felt that this was unlikely, and the Heavenly Sound Domain Ancestor would not be so stupid.

"Maybe it's because the communication object on his body is damaged, and he can't be contacted, or the place where he is can't be communicated!"

Tianrui Domain Ancestor thought to himself.

Of course, there is another possibility, that is, the Celestial Sound Domain Ancestor has fallen.

But he didn't think so.

Wow!

Tianrui Domain Ancestor led many of his domain ancestors to the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm.

After entering the Xuanxu Forbidden Realm, he inquired a little and was immediately furious.

"Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestors, you are looking for !!! death"

Tianrui Domain Ancestor said angrily.

He never expected that his right-hand man, the Tianyin Domain Ancestor at the elite Domain Ancestor level, would actually die at the hands of the Ten Thousand Law Dao Ancestor.

It was inconceivable that the Elite Domain Ancestor died at the hands of the Returning One Realm Half-Step Domain Ancestor, but the truth was undoubted.

He didn't know how the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor defeated the Heavenly Sound Domain Ancestor, but he wouldn't let the Ten Thousand Laws Dao Ancestor go.

this day.

Tianrui Domain Ancestor led many Domain Ancestors to descend into the void outside the human realm.

Today, he wants to break through the human realm and wash the human race in blood.
